message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam sequenceStyle rectangle

package "sw-explorer" as swExplorer {
  participant "WebApp" as webApp
  participant "SWData" as swData
}

package "Example background processing module" as bgpModule {
  participant "Manager" as manager
  participant "MessageQueue" as messageQueue
  participant "Worker" as worker
  participant "Memcache" as memcache
}

note right of manager
  This is just an example.
  We could got wi go with Celery, but sometimes it's good to hide the concrete engine behind the abstraction layer.
end note

webApp -> webApp : fetch new collection
webApp -> swData : fetch new collection
swData -> manager : schedule a job

manager -> messageQueue : schedule a job
messageQueue -> worker : execute a job
worker -> manager : update job status
manager -> memcache : update job status
worker -> manager : job result
manager -> memcache : job result

webApp -> webApp : view pending collection
webApp -> swData : get job status
swData -> manager : get job status
manager -> memcache : get job status

@enduml
